text: - 5.1 Subcontractor is required to participate in coordination of MEPF systems, despite whether its scope is directly MEPF or not.  The coordination process will be led by Contractor / Contractor's BIM Subcontractor.  Contractor's BIM Subcontractor will lead a BIM Kick-off Meeting as well as the subsequent BIM Coordination Meetings. Note: coordination meetings maybe held multiple times per week, weekly, or other interval as determined by Contractor / Contractor's BIM Subcontractor as necessary to support the overall project schedule).
